action_set_definitions.name: check_energy_balance
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current available energy in player_resources to ensure the budget constraint is monitored.

action_set_definitions.name: query_unit_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific data for a given unit, including its type, position, and current biomechanical status.

unit_id.description: The unique identifier for the unit (e.g., 'RB_22').

action_set_definitions.name: assess_environment_friction
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the environment at the unit's current location to determine the surface coefficient of friction (mu) and the traction demand required for maneuvers.

unit_id.description: The ID of the unit whose location's environment is being scanned.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_biomechanical_optimization
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a corrective optimization protocol on a unit to resolve biomechanical failures.

unit_id.description: The ID of the unit to optimize.

protocol_type.description: The protocol to run: 'kinematic_realignment' for low-friction or 'axial_load_redistribution' for high-friction.

action_set_definitions.name: evaluate_maneuver_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Evaluates the performance metrics of a specific maneuver for a unit to check certification eligibility.

maneuver_name.description: The name of the maneuver (e.g., 'Apex Leap').

state_description.player_resources: The current balance of game currencies (e.g., gold, wood, energy).
state_description.turn_count: The current turn number in the simulation.
state_description.map_dimensions: The [width, height] of the game map.
state_description.units: A list of active units, their types, positions, and health status.
state_description.game_phase: The current phase of the turn (e.g., 'exploration', 'combat', 'upkeep').
